home_advantage_allseason_text: Suitable for year-round use, does not deform at ±50 °C.
home_advantage_clean_text: Thanks to the special material structure, moisture and dirt stay contained.
home_advantage_fixing_text: Original clips and hook-and-loop system for a secure hold.
home_advantage_coverage_text: Laser precision to templates for maximum interior coverage.
home_advantage_easyclean_text: Lightweight, easy to remove and clean with a water jet.

home_category_cushions_text: Comfortable headrest cushions for your vehicle.

home_comparison_handle_label: Drag the divider to compare before and after
home_guarantee_exchange_text: Our mats are made individually for your vehicle. If there are any issues, contact us directly via WhatsApp or Telegram with a photo and description — we will find a solution together.
home_consult_text: Fill out the form — our manager will get in touch shortly.
home_consult_success: Thank you! We will contact you within 30 minutes.
home_contact_note: Orders are accepted around the clock.
home_contact_consent: I agree to the processing of my personal data.
faq_q1: How long is the warranty on the mats?
faq_a1: We provide a guaranteed lifespan of 1 year on the material.
faq_q2: What if the mats don't fit?
faq_a2: An exchange is possible within 14 days in case of mismatch.
faq_q3: How long do the mats last?
faq_a3: Many years under normal use — the material is extremely durable.
faq_a4: With original clips and an additional hook-and-loop system.
faq_q5: Do the mats have an odour?
faq_a5: No. The certified EVA material is odour-neutral.
faq_a6: Yes, EVA is hypoallergenic and safe for interiors.
faq_a7: Very — it resists ±50 °C, moisture and abrasion.
eva_hero_intro: We manufacture NEOMAT mats exclusively from certified premium material. Our direct factory supplier works according to the international quality management system ISO 9001:2015.
eva_reason_temp_text: Dimensionally stable from −50 °C to +50 °C — suitable for summer and winter.
eva_reason_waterproof_text: The EVA structure keeps water, dirt and mud on the mat.
eva_reason_hypo_text: No odour, no allergens — safe for children and pets.
eva_reason_clean_text: Simply take out and rinse off with a water jet.
eva_reason_durable_text: Developed for extreme operating conditions — lasts for many years.
eva_reason_iso_text: Our supplier is certified to ISO 9001:2015.
eva_why_direct_text: We buy raw materials directly from the leading certified manufacturer.
eva_why_quality_text: ISO 9001:2015 means automated quality control — zero defects.
eva_why_safety_text: 100% hypoallergenic, developed for extreme operating conditions.
eva_cta_text: Choose your vehicle and create your individual EVA mat.
contact_intro: Questions about your order or configuration? Reach us by phone, email or the form below.
contact_topic_order_status: Order status / Why isn't my status changing?
contact_success: Thank you! Your message has been sent — we'll reply shortly.
cushions_intro: Ergonomic headrest cushions in EVA and EVA-leather — comfort and style for every journey.
eva_bags_intro: Waterproof, hard-wearing EVA storage bags and organisers for your boot.
eva_bags_with_lid_text: Closed bags with lid and zipper — keep everything clean and tidy.
eva_bags_without_lid_text: Open bags and organisers — quick access to your gear.
leather_bags_intro: Elegant EVA-leather bags and organisers — premium look, easy to care for.
product_delivery_note: Organiser alone: shipping charged. With a full mat set to Germany: free. To the rest of Europe: shipping charged.
product_kk_03_desc: Set of 2 for driver and passenger.
product_kk_04_desc: With memory foam for extra comfort.
product_tb_eva_01_desc: Waterproof EVA bag, ideal for the trunk.
product_tb_eva_02_desc: With lid and zipper, keeps everything clean.
product_tb_eva_03_desc: Large volume for tools and accessories.
product_tb_eva_05_desc: Double bag with lid for more order.
product_tb_led_01_desc: Elegant EVA-leather look, easy-care and sturdy.
product_tb_led_05_desc: Set of 2 in elegant leather look.
product_tb_led_06_desc: Compact and stylish for on the go.
configurator_intro: Select your vehicle to build a tailored EVA mat set.
configurator_brand_subtitle: Select your vehicle's brand to continue.
configurator_heel_pad_hint: This vehicle is available with two heel-pad variants — please choose one.
configurator_no_match: No pattern found for this selection.
configurator_submit_success: Thank you! Your configuration has been sent — we'll be in touch shortly.
configurator_submit_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
configurator_diagram_hint: Tap a zone to add or remove that mat.
configurator_select_vehicle_hint: Select model and year to see your vehicle.
configurator_refine_hint: Optional — these details refine your order, they don't change the available patterns.
refine_year_hint: Select the vehicle year range first.
configurator_material_eva_info: EVA is a closed-cell foam: dimensionally stable from −50 °C to +50 °C, 100% waterproof, hypoallergenic and odour-neutral. Easy to clean and developed for extreme operating conditions.
configurator_about_eva_text: We manufacture exclusively from certified premium EVA. The structure keeps water, dirt and mud on the mat and is safe for children and pets.
configurator_kit_hint: Pick the mats you need, or use a preset. The car diagram stays in sync.
configurator_clips_with_hint: Check if your car has OEM floor mat anchors front and rear.
configurator_clips_without_hint: Select if your car has no OEM anchors.
heel_rest_info_metal: A brushed-metal heel plate that resists scuffing from your shoe heel — the most hard-wearing option for high-mileage driver mats.
heel_rest_info_rubber: A textured rubber heel pad that adds grip and quiet underfoot, protecting the mat where your heel rests while driving.
configurator_heel_unsupported: The selected pattern does not support a heel pad.
heel_pad_3d_not_available: 3D heel pad not available for this vehicle
configurator_auth_hint: You'll be asked to sign in to pay or contact a manager.
texture_info_rhombus: Rhombus — a classic quilted look with deep diamond channels that guide water and dirt into the grooves. Firm, structured feel underfoot.
texture_info_honeycomb: Honeycomb — hexagonal cells with high edge density for maximum grip and a modern look. Holds the most debris of the three.
texture_info_drop: Drop — soft rounded droplet pattern, the smoothest underfoot and the easiest to wipe clean.
kit_info_full_interior: Full interior: both front mats plus both rear mats — covers the whole passenger floor. Ships free within Germany.
kit_info_premium_set: Premium set: full interior plus a matching boot liner for complete coverage. Ships free within Germany.
mounting_info_3d: 3D mount uses raised edges and OEM-matched fixings to lock the mat in place and contain spills — recommended for the driver side.
heel_pad_info_standard: Standard heel pad: a reinforced pad at the driver's heel area — protects the most-worn spot and extends the mat's life.
heel_pad_info_3d: 3D heel pad: a raised, contoured heel pad with extra depth — maximum protection and a premium finish where supported.
configurator_delivery_threshold_info: Shipping is free within Germany for full-interior and premium sets (orders from €100); smaller sets are charged per the table.

seo_privacy_description: How NEOMATTEN collects, uses and protects your personal data.
seo_terms_description: The general terms and conditions for ordering at NEOMATTEN.
seo_withdrawal_description: Your statutory right of withdrawal when ordering at NEOMATTEN.

imprint_disclaimer: Despite careful checking of content, we assume no liability for the content of external links. The operators of the linked pages are solely responsible for their content.
privacy_intro: We take the protection of your personal data seriously and treat it confidentially in accordance with the GDPR and this privacy policy.
privacy_data_collection: When you contact us or place an order, we process the data you provide (e.g. name, address, email, phone, vehicle details) solely to handle your request and order.
privacy_cookies: Our website uses only technically necessary cookies and local storage required to operate the configurator and your session. No tracking cookies are set without your consent.
privacy_hosting: Our hosting provider stores access data (e.g. IP address, time of request) in server log files for security and stability. This data is not merged with other data sources.
privacy_rights: You have the right to information, correction, deletion, restriction of processing, data portability and to object. You may also lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.
privacy_contact:
For any data protection requests, contact us at:
neomatten.de@gmail.com
terms_intro: These general terms and conditions (GTC) apply to all orders placed via our online shop and configurator.
terms_scope: These GTC apply to all contracts between NEOMATTEN and the customer concerning the goods presented in our shop and configurator.
terms_order: The presentation of products is not a binding offer. By submitting an order you make a binding offer; the contract is concluded once we confirm the order.
terms_prices: All prices include the statutory VAT. Shipping costs are shown separately before you complete the order. Payment is made via the methods offered at checkout.
terms_delivery: Delivery times are stated in the configurator. Custom-made mats are produced individually; typical production time is 5–7 working days plus shipping.
terms_warranty: Statutory warranty rights apply. Made-to-measure products are manufactured individually for your vehicle; in case of issues please contact us directly.
terms_withdrawal: Consumers have a statutory right of withdrawal as described on our Right of Withdrawal page.
withdrawal_intro: Consumers are entitled to a statutory right of withdrawal under the conditions below.
withdrawal_right: You have the right to withdraw from this contract within fourteen days without giving any reason.
withdrawal_period: The withdrawal period is fourteen days from the day on which you, or a third party named by you who is not the carrier, took possession of the goods.
withdrawal_exercise:
To exercise your right of withdrawal, inform us by a clear statement (e.g. a letter or email):
NEOMATTEN GmbH
Musterstraße 42, 10115 Berlin
neomatten.de@gmail.com
withdrawal_consequences: If you withdraw, we will refund all payments received from you, including standard delivery costs, without undue delay and within fourteen days. Note: the right of withdrawal may not apply to goods made to your individual specification.
